commands.name: play
commands.description: Start demo using the given script file

options.name: --line-breaks
options.description: (true|false) Add line breaks before command arguments

arguments.name: FILEPATH
arguments.description: FilePath to the script file to play

commands.name: script
commands.description: Scripts the demo commands using the given script file

options.name: --line-breaks
options.description:
(true|false) Add line breaks before command
arguments

options.name: --arguments-prefix
options.description:
Add line breaks before command arguments. p.e. -p
"  "

options.name: --bash-header
options.description:
(true|false) Add the bash script header line at
the begining of the script

arguments.name: FILEPATH
arguments.description: FilePath to the script file to play
